fields.name: G/L Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger entry where cost from the associated value entry number in this record is posted.

fields.name: Value Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the value entry that has its cost posted in the associated general ledger entry in this record.

fields.name: G/L Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger register, where the general ledger entry in this record was posted.
